subject: Update ansible versions
commit_message:
Update ansible versions

Update ansible docker versions for appc and sdnc

Change-Id: I1da74864e18d8cc940908ade128e1217d08d9708
Issue-ID: CCSDK-1166
Signed-off-by: Timoney, Dan (dt5972) <dtimoney@att.com>
